notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this Act”, meaning , , , known as the Elder Abuse Prevention and Prosecution Act, which is classified principally to this chapter. children.text: the terms “abuse”, “adult protective services”, “elder”, “elder justice”, “exploitation”, “law enforcement”, and “neglect” have the meanings given those terms in ;section 1397j of title 42
the term “elder abuse” includes abuse, neglect, and exploitation of an elder; and
the term “State” means each of the several States of the United States, the District of Columbia, the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico, and any other territory or possession of the United States.
